An attacker can inject fake log entries into the log file by sending a specially crafted GET request containing a CRLF sequence in the request path. This vulnerability allows attackers to corrupt log files, potentially covering tracks of other attacks, confusing log post-processing tools, and forging log entries. The issue is due to improper output neutralization for logs.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00574, "percentile": 0.43507}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-84pr-m4jr-85g5", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-04-22T14:08:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-84pr-m4jr-85g5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-84pr-m4jr-85g5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2024-1681"}], "nvd_published_at": "2024-04-19T20:15:09Z", "published_at": "2024-04-19T21:31:08Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-1681", "https://huntr.com/bounties/25a7a0ba-9fa2-4777-acb6-03e5539bb644", "https://github.com/corydolphin/flask-cors/blob/40acc8092332dfed4bb54d7a4f89a6d479466de7/flask_cors/extension.py#L194", "https://lists.debian.org/debian-lts-announce/2025/05/msg00049.html", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/flask-cors/PYSEC-2024-271.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-84pr-m4jr-85g5"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/corydolphin/flask-cors", "summary": "flask-cors vulnerable to log injection when the log level is set to debug", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T17:54:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-84pr-m4jr-85g5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "flask-cors"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: flask-cors vulnerable to log injection when the log level is set to debug
